name: @JoeCardoso13/google-calendar
description: MCP server for the Google Calendar API

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List all calendars the user has access to

tools.name: get_calendar
tools.description: Get metadata for a specific calendar

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events from a calendar within a time range

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get a single event by ID

tools.name: quick_add_event
tools.description: Create an event from natural language text

tools.name: query_freebusy
tools.description: Check free/busy status for calendars in a time range
